message:
fix(node): replace silent push_bounded eviction with explicit capacity enforcement

SSRF allowlist now returns SsrfTemplateInvalid when capacity is exceeded
instead of silently dropping the oldest entry, preventing undetected
policy erosion. Conformance fixture overflow now cleans up the
id_registry for evicted entries, fixing a stale-ID leak where dropped
fixtures left dangling registry entries that could cause false lookups.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
